headline: Billary Clintons 🕶️🍆 SWIM INTO Epstein CONGRESS GRILLING 💦🔥
text:
Bill Clinton 🕶️👅 'Slick Willie' and Hill-Dog Hillary 🧢💅 are DIVING 💦🏊‍♂️ HEADFIRST into the EPSTEIN 🛩️🍑 CONGRESSIONAL PROBE 🔥📜 – DAYS before GOP cucks 🐔🔒 were set to SLAP 'em with CRIMINAL CONTEMPT 🚔😡 for GHOSTING summonses like BAD EXES 👻💨! House Oversight Committee, led by Comer 🔥🇺🇸, had the bipartisan BOOT 👢 ready after MONTHS of Clintons dodging like Bill dodging Monica stains 🩷😏!

Bill 'I did not have sexual relations' 🕶️🚫 admits he FLEW Epstein's LOLITA EXPRESS 🛩️🍆 FOUR TIMES in 2002-03 📅✈️, PIC'D chillin' in POOL 🏊‍♂️💦 and HOT TUBBING 🛁😍 with hands behind head like 'What island? Which girls? 🤷‍♂️🍑' – but SWEARZ he CUT TIES 20 years ago 🚫🕰️ before pedo deets DROPPED 💣! No survivors ACCUSING him YET 👀🚫, but logs and DOJ PHOTOS 🖼️🔥 spilling that SWEATY TEA ☕💦 from Congress' EPSTEIN FILES LAW 📜💥!

Hillz, ex-SecState boss babe 💼👩‍💼, and Bill's squad NEGOTIATED 'good faith' 🤝😇 per deputy Angel Ureña's X RANT 📱💨: 'We SPILLED under OATH already 📖🙏, y'all just HUNTING POLITICAL CLOUTS 🏹🤡 – but we'll SHOW UP to SET PRECEDENT for EVERYONE 👑⚖️!' They claim SWORN STATEMENTS dropped 'limited info' 🗣️📄, call it TRUMP-DIRECTED EMBARRASSMENT PLOT 🍊👹 to ROAST rivals like MTG rage-quits 🔥🍑!

Comer CLAPS BACK 👏😤: 'BIPARTISAN SUBPOENAS 📜✅, no one's ABOVE THE LAW ⚖️🚫 – we BEGGED for dates 📅🙏 but Clintons DELAY-GAMED like Epstein's flight manifests ✈️⏳!' First ex-POTUS testifying since Gerald Ford 🦅📺 in '83 – HISTORY B*TCHES 🕰️💥! Clintons' LETTER to Comer 💌📧 ROASTS his 'PARTISAN POLITICS' 🤡🎪 blocking FACTS on gov's EPSTEIN ROLE 🕵️‍♂️🍆, but GOP says 'HOLD MY GAVEL 🔨🇺🇸' – NO ESCAPE from the HOT SEAT 🔥🪑!

Epstein DEAD in clink 2019 🪦🚔, but his GUEST LIST 👥🍑 still HAUNTING DC like Ghislaine's black book 📖😈 – Billary SWEARING 'we knew NADA' 🙈🚫, but JET LOGS and POOL PICS got X buzzing 🐝📱: 'Slick Willie HOT TUBBIN' with PEDO PIMP? 😱💦 SPILL THE REAL TEA ☕🔥 or CONTEMPT CUFFS incoming 🚔🔒!' Comer: 'Delay no more, DADDIES 👨‍💼👑!' – Epstein probe ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ just leveled UP 📈😩!
